ogTitle: North Manly vs North Narrabeen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Manly and North Narrabeen.
heading: North Manly vs North Narrabeen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Manly, New South Wales and North Narrabeen, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Narrabeen has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to North Manly (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Manly or North Narrabeen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Manly has a flood risk score of 55/100, while North Narrabeen scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Manly scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. North Narrabeen scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Manly or North Narrabeen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Narrabeen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
